title: Director, IT Application Development & Business Intelligence
raw_jd:
irector, IT Application Development & Business Intelligence

Location: New York, NY (Hybrid/Remote)


About the Role

We are seeking a strategic and forward-thinking Director of IT Application Development & Business Intelligence to lead the evolution of our enterprise application ecosystem. This role sits at the intersection of technology, data, and business transformation—driving innovation across finance, lending, and program delivery systems.

Reporting to the CIO, you will shape and execute a multi-year application strategy that balances operational excellence with emerging capabilities, including AI-driven insights, automation, and decision support. You’ll partner cross-functionally to ensure our platforms are scalable, secure, and aligned with long-term organizational goals.

What You’ll Do

Strategic Leadership & Vision

    Define and execute a forward-looking strategy for enterprise applications, incorporating AI and automation to enhance performance and decision-making
    Lead the transition from heavily customized systems to modern, configurable, and composable platforms
    Translate complex business needs across finance and lending into scalable technology solutions
    Partner with IT and business leaders to align application strategy with enterprise priorities

Application Portfolio Management

    Oversee the full lifecycle of enterprise applications, including ERP, CRM, financial, and lending systems (e.g., Salesforce, NetSuite, Box, and other SaaS platforms)
    Establish architecture standards, integration frameworks, and governance models
    Implement structured intake, prioritization, and portfolio management processes
    Evaluate vendor roadmaps and emerging technologies to drive continuous improvement

Business Partnership & Delivery

    Collaborate with finance, lending, and operations leaders to optimize business processes through technology
    Lead application modernization initiatives aligned with the enterprise IT roadmap
    Support portfolio planning, prioritization, and stakeholder communication

Team Leadership & Development

    Lead and develop high-performing teams across application development, administration, and business intelligence
    Foster a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement
    Upskill teams to leverage AI and modern development practices across the software lifecycle

Data, Security & Governance

    Ensure applications meet security, privacy, regulatory, and audit requirements
    Establish governance frameworks for data integrity and AI-enabled capabilities
    Partner closely with IT Security to uphold enterprise standards

Vendor & Financial Management

    Manage vendor relationships, contracts, and implementation partners
    Oversee application budgets, licensing, and renewals to maximize ROI

What You Bring

Required Qualifications

    Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field
    10+ years of experience in enterprise applications or software development
    5+ years in a leadership role managing application teams or platforms
    Proven ability to lead cross-functional initiatives and influence senior stakeholders

Preferred Experience

    Experience supporting finance, lending, banking, or financial operations systems
    Expertise in enterprise integrations (APIs, ETL/ELT, SaaS ecosystems)
    Experience modernizing enterprise reporting and business intelligence platforms
    Exposure to AI-enabled enterprise technologies and digital transformation initiatives

Key Competencies

    Strategic thinking and long-term planning
    Application portfolio and lifecycle management
    Financial systems and lending domain expertise
    Change leadership and organizational transformation
    Governance, risk management, and ethical decision-making

Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to play a pivotal role in shaping the future of enterprise technology within a mission-driven organization. You’ll lead meaningful transformation efforts, influence executive strategy, and build systems that directly impact business outcomes.

Featured benefits

Medical insurance, Vision insurance, Dental insurance, 401(k), Tuition assistance

Requirements added by the job poster

• Bachelor's Degree

• 5+ years of work experience with Stakeholder Management

• 5+ years of work experience with Salesforce.com

• 2+ years of work experience with AI Software Development

score.skills_rationale: Excellent alignment with candidate's core expertise in BI architecture, enterprise applications, ERP systems, and data strategy. Strong match on Salesforce, financial systems, and modernization experience. AI requirements align with candidate's recent RAG/LLM work.
score.scope_rationale: Perfect scope match - director-level role requiring strategic leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and team management. Candidate's VA FMBT architect role, CFO-level reporting at Howard, and consulting leadership demonstrate ideal experience level.
score.pay_rationale: No salary range provided in the JD, making pay alignment impossible to assess.
red_flags: Hybrid/Remote location unclear for NY-based role
score.raw_analysis: This is an exceptional match for the candidate's background and career trajectory. The role perfectly combines enterprise application strategy, BI architecture, financial systems expertise, and emerging AI capabilities - all core strengths. The director-level scope, strategic focus, and cross-functional leadership requirements align ideally with the candidate's experience. Only concern is the lack of salary transparency, but the role quality justifies pursuit.

cover_letters.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

As a hands-on data and platform leader with 25+ years architecting enterprise systems, I am uniquely positioned to drive your application development and business intelligence strategy forward. My current role leading data architecture for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation—where I've designed enterprise data pipelines integrating legacy financial systems with modern ERP platforms—directly mirrors the modernization challenges you're facing. At Howard University, I served as one of three cross-functional leaders driving a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation through executive disruption, ultimately stabilizing delivery and ensuring successful deployment. This experience managing high-stakes financial system transformations while coordinating across finance, IT, and operations stakeholders is exactly what this director role demands.

Your emphasis on AI-driven insights and automation aligns perfectly with my recent technical innovations. I've designed and deployed on-premises LLM/RAG platforms for secure knowledge retrieval, implementing role-based access controls and audit logging—capabilities that directly support your vision for AI-enabled enterprise technologies. My architectural approach bridges infrastructure, data, and business needs, evidenced by building containerized data environments, establishing data validation frameworks that improved audit readiness, and creating executive dashboards that support C-level decision-making. At VitalSpring Technologies, I delivered BI solutions that identified process bottlenecks and saved over $70K in under six months, demonstrating my ability to translate complex technical capabilities into measurable business value.

The cross-functional leadership this role requires is where I excel most. Whether coordinating VA's FMBT stakeholders across finance and acquisition teams, mentoring engineering teams through system transitions, or partnering with Deputy CFOs on analytics strategy, I consistently deliver results in ambiguous, high-pressure environments. My experience spans the full enterprise application lifecycle—from vendor evaluation and contract management to team development and governance frameworks. I don't just manage application portfolios; I architect resilient systems that scale, integrate disparate platforms under tight deadlines, and step in hands-on to resolve the complex technical challenges that derail lesser initiatives.

This director role represents the natural evolution of my career—combining strategic application leadership with the deep technical expertise and proven delivery track record your organization needs. I'm ready to shape your enterprise technology future and would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience driving large-scale financial system modernizations can accelerate your transformation goals.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

Your search for a Director of IT Application Development & Business Intelligence reflects the complex challenge many organizations face today: modernizing enterprise applications while delivering immediate business value. Having spent the last several years leading enterprise application transformations—including two major ERP implementations and the design of AI-enabled data platforms—I understand the delicate balance required to drive strategic modernization while maintaining operational stability.

At the Department of Veterans Affairs, I'm currently architecting the data and reporting backbone for their $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation, integrating legacy systems with modern ERP platforms while ensuring audit-ready data quality. This mirrors your need to transition from heavily customized systems to configurable, modern platforms. Similarly, at Howard University, I helped stabilize and drive to completion a multi-million-dollar Workday implementation during executive disruption, serving as one of three cross-functional leaders bridging Finance, HR, and IT—experience that directly aligns with your emphasis on cross-functional partnership and stakeholder influence.

What particularly resonates is your focus on AI-driven insights and automation. I've recently designed and implemented an on-premises LLM/RAG platform for secure knowledge retrieval, combining my traditional strengths in data architecture with emerging AI capabilities. This hands-on experience with AI implementation, paired with my deep expertise in enterprise integrations and BI modernization, positions me well to help your organization navigate both the strategic vision and tactical execution of AI-enabled transformation initiatives.

I'm drawn to the opportunity to shape enterprise application strategy at the intersection of technology and business transformation. My background leading complex system integrations, managing cross-functional stakeholders, and delivering mission-critical platforms in high-stakes environments has prepared me to partner with your team in driving meaningful transformation while ensuring operational excellence.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm writing to express my interest in the Director, IT Application Development & Business Intelligence position. With 25+ years architecting enterprise data and application systems, I bring the exact combination of strategic leadership and hands-on technical expertise you're seeking. Currently leading data architecture for the VA's $1B+ Financial Management Business Transformation program, I've designed enterprise data pipelines integrating legacy financial systems with modern ERP platforms, delivered executive reporting systems, and established audit-ready data governance—directly paralleling your modernization objectives. My recent work includes building secure on-premise LLM/RAG platforms for knowledge retrieval, positioning me well to drive your AI-enabled transformation initiatives.

My cross-functional leadership experience spans both technical delivery and business partnership. At Howard University, I served as one of three key leaders (Finance, HR, IT) driving a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation through executive disruption, ultimately stabilizing delivery and achieving successful deployment. This experience, combined with my background managing enterprise BI platforms for Fortune 100 clients and leading technical teams through complex system transitions, aligns perfectly with your need for someone who can translate business needs into scalable technology solutions while managing stakeholder relationships at the executive level.

Best regards,
Salil Maniktahla

tailored_resume:
SALIL MANIKTAHLA
Springfield, VA  ·  571-215-8218  ·  salil.maniktahla@gmail.com  ·  linkedin.com/in/salilmaniktahla

SUMMARY
Strategic technology leader with 25+ years of experience driving enterprise application development, business intelligence platforms, and cross-functional transformation initiatives. Currently leading data architecture and application modernization for the Department of Veterans Affairs' Financial Management Business Transformation program, orchestrating the evolution from legacy systems to modern ERP platforms across a large-scale enterprise environment.

Proven expertise in translating complex business needs into scalable technology solutions, with deep experience in financial systems, lending operations, and stakeholder management at the executive level. Recent focus on AI-driven insights and automation, including deployment of secure AI/LLM platforms for enterprise knowledge retrieval and decision support.

CORE CAPABILITIES
Enterprise Application Strategy & Portfolio Management
    • Multi-year application roadmaps, ERP modernization, SaaS platform integration
    • Vendor management, contract optimization, and technology evaluation
    • Cross-functional stakeholder management and executive partnership

Financial Systems & Business Intelligence
    • Financial operations systems, ERP implementations (Workday, iFAMS), reporting platforms
    • Business intelligence architecture, data warehousing, and executive dashboard development
    • Budget planning, financial reconciliation, and audit-ready system design

AI & Automation Integration
    • AI-enabled enterprise technologies, RAG pipelines, and automated decision support
    • Local model deployment for secure knowledge retrieval with role-based access
    • Emerging technology evaluation and strategic implementation planning

Team Leadership & Transformation
    • Cross-functional technical leadership spanning Finance, IT, and Operations
    • Change leadership through system transitions and organizational transformation
    • Team development, mentoring, and upskilling across modern development practices

Data Architecture & Integration
    • Enterprise integrations (APIs, ETL/ELT), data pipelines, and system interoperability
    • Data governance frameworks, security standards, and regulatory compliance
    • Application lifecycle management and governance model implementation

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data & Analytics Architect (Contractor)
U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs – FMBT	Sep 2021 – Present
    • Lead enterprise application strategy and modernization for VA's Financial Management Business Transformation program, overseeing transition from legacy systems to modern ERP platforms
    • Define and execute forward-looking application architecture incorporating AI-driven insights and automation for enhanced financial decision-making
    • Partner with CIO office, finance leaders, and cross-functional stakeholders to align application portfolio with enterprise priorities and long-term organizational goals
    • Establish integration frameworks and governance models for enterprise applications, including ERP systems (iFAMS/Momentum), financial platforms, and reporting systems
    • Implement structured portfolio management processes for application lifecycle oversight, vendor evaluation, and technology roadmap development
    • Build AI-enabled capabilities for automated reconciliation, data validation, and executive reporting across financial operations
    • Manage vendor relationships and coordinate with implementation partners to ensure delivery alignment with business requirements

Business Intelligence Analyst – Finance
Howard University	Apr 2020 – Jul 2024
    • Played key leadership role in multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation, serving as one of three cross-functional drivers (Finance, HR, IT) during executive transition period
    • Led application modernization initiatives across financial systems, transitioning from heavily customized legacy platforms to modern, configurable ERP solutions
    • Collaborated directly with CFO and Deputy CFO to optimize business processes through technology, translating complex financial requirements into scalable system solutions
    • Established data governance frameworks and integration standards for enterprise applications, ensuring security, privacy, and audit compliance
    • Managed stakeholder relationships across finance, operations, and IT leadership, facilitating cross-functional alignment and delivery coordination
    • Designed and implemented enterprise BI architecture supporting executive decision-making and operational performance monitoring

BI Partner / Strategist (Independent Consultant)
Multiple Clients	Jul 2016 – Mar 2020
    • Led enterprise application development and business intelligence initiatives across diverse client environments, focusing on financial services and lending operations
    • Managed application portfolios and vendor relationships, overseeing contract negotiations, licensing optimization, and technology evaluation processes
    • Established governance frameworks for data integrity and application security across SaaS ecosystems and enterprise integrations
    • Mentored development teams and drove adoption of modern development practices across software lifecycle management
    • Built 40+ dashboards supporting 350+ users globally, demonstrating expertise in scaling BI platforms for enterprise environments

Co-Founder / CEO & Technical Director
Urban Evolution	Apr 2010 – Apr 2020
    • Served as CIO and technology strategist for multi-location business, owning enterprise application strategy, vendor management, and financial systems integration
    • Led digital transformation initiatives, implementing modern POS, CRM, and financial reporting platforms across franchise operations
    • Managed application budgets, licensing agreements, and vendor relationships to maximize ROI and operational efficiency
    • Built cross-functional teams and established governance frameworks for technology operations and business process optimization

VitalSpring Technologies
BI Senior Manager	May 2008 – Jul 2016
    • Product Manager for enterprise BI/analytics initiatives across healthcare supply chain operations, with focus on financial and operational systems
    • Led application modernization projects transitioning from legacy reporting systems to modern analytics platforms
    • Designed dashboards and automated processes identifying operational bottlenecks, delivering $70K+ cost savings within 6 months
    • Managed stakeholder relationships with finance and operations leaders, translating business requirements into technical solutions
    • Established Agile delivery frameworks and mentored technical teams across application development and platform management

EARLIER EXPERIENCE

Senior BI Consultant – Claraview (Teradata), 2006–2008
    • Technical architect for 25,000-user enterprise reporting platform (Lowe's); defined KPIs and application architecture for Fortune 100 financial systems

BI Consultant – Kinetic Networks, 2005–2006
    • Delivered enterprise application solutions for Google, Yahoo, Wells Fargo, focusing on financial operations and business intelligence platforms

IT Specialist – U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, 2002–2005
    • Defined IT strategy and led team of 6 developers; managed application portfolio for National Center for Environmental Economics

Operations Manager – MicroStrategy, 1999–2001
    • Led engineering team delivering integrated analytics systems; managed vendor relationships saving ~$312K annually through contract optimization

SELECTED SYSTEMS & INNOVATION
    • Designed secure AI/LLM platform for enterprise knowledge retrieval using local models with role-based access controls and audit logging capabilities
    • Built containerized application development environments supporting modern CI/CD practices across distributed infrastructure
    • Implemented event-driven automation and monitoring systems integrating with enterprise applications and data pipelines
    • Operate advanced technology laboratory (10GbE infrastructure, 100TB+ storage, Docker-based services) for emerging technology evaluation

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Enterprise Applications: ERP systems (Workday, iFAMS), CRM platforms, Financial systems, SaaS ecosystem integration
Data & Analytics: SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, Data Modeling, Enterprise Data Pipelines, Business Intelligence Architecture
BI Platforms: Tableau, Power BI, MicroStrategy
Integration & APIs: REST/SOAP APIs, Enterprise Service Bus, Data integration frameworks
AI & Automation: RAG pipelines, embeddings, vector search, local model deployment, AI-enabled decision support
Infrastructure: Linux (Ubuntu), Docker, Containerization, Distributed Systems, Cloud platforms (Azure)

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION

B.A., Washington University in St. Louis
CISSP  ·  Certified Scrum Master  ·  Tableau Certified Professional  ·  MicroStrategy Certified Developer
